content: Hi, I need a bulk order of iPads and Dell laptops for our company.
Can you do 400 OMR for the iPads? We are ordering 10 units.
Deal! Please send the updated quote.
Is the Samsung Galaxy S24 available in blue color?
Yes! We have Blue, Black, and Violet in stock.
1 year manufacturer warranty + 6 months extended from us.
Great, I will place the order today.
I need 5 Sony WH-1000XM5 for a studio project.
Sure! I can offer 140 OMR each for 5 units.
Yes, we include premium cases with bulk orders.
Hello! I can offer 10 iPads at 450 OMR each and 10 Dell XPS at 650 OMR each.
I can do 420 OMR per unit for 10+ orders. Best price I can offer.
Updated quote sent. Total: 10,700 OMR for 10 iPads + 10 Dell XPS.
Delivery within 5-7 business days to Muscat.
